name: Dorman Products, Inc.
summary: PART I . General We are one of the leading suppliers of replacement and upgrade parts in the motor vehicle aftermarket industry, serving passenger cars, light-, medium-, and heavy-duty trucks, as well as specialty vehicles, including utility terrain vehicles ("UTVs") and all-terrain vehicles ("ATVs"). As of December31, 2025, we marketed approximately 144,000 distinct parts compared to approximately 138,000 as of December31, 2024, many of which we designed and engineered.
